119-hres-354.feedback: Excellent summary that clearly explains this procedural bill in simple terms. Correctly identifies that this schedules votes rather than directly overturning rules. Good use of plain language and proper grouping of related EPA rules.

119-hres-405.feedback: Excellent summary. Clear, neutral language that accurately describes this procedural vote. Good use of simple terms like 'sets up House votes' instead of legislative jargon. Each provision is a single, clear sentence under 25 words.

119-hres-436.feedback: The summary has two main issues: (1) 'Rules Committee Print 119-3' is legislative jargon that readers won't understand - use plain language like 'replacement text from the Rules Committee' instead. (2) Most importantly, the summary refers to 'H.R. 1' throughout but never explains what H.R. 1 actually does. Readers need to understand what they're voting on rules for. The summary should briefly explain H.R. 1's purpose in the one-liner or first provision.

119-hres-426.feedback: Excellent summary that clearly explains this procedural rule in simple language. The one-liner effectively captures the purpose, and provisions accurately describe what the rule accomplishes without jargon. Good use of 'cancel' to describe CRA disapproval votes.
